utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items required in the format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). The final package includes all 7 top-level items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. Now check if each is fully specified per requirements: 1) destination: provided (OK). 2) travel_dates: specific dates provided (OK). 3) transportation: only departure city and an estimated flight cost range; lacks specific flight details (airline, times) but has costs—does not fully meet 'flight details with costs' (NOT OK). 4) accommodation: type, estimated cost range, location; lacks specific hotel selection name/details—does not fully meet 'hotel selection with costs' (NOT OK). 5) activities: only a general type and a vague cost note; lacks selected specific activities with costs (NOT OK). 6) additional_services: provided, with items but no costs; requirement says 'any extra services with costs'—costs missing (NOT OK). 7) total_budget: given as a single figure without a complete cost breakdown—does not meet 'complete cost breakdown' (NOT OK). Therefore, only 2/7 are fully specified (destination and travel_dates).

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final package includes the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic' which appears in the ground-truth destinations list. Transportation is unspecified between classes or airline types, only an estimated cost, so it cannot be mapped to a specific rated transportation option. Accommodation is described generically as '3-4 star hotel' in 'Central Prague' without matching any specific accommodation category from the ratings (e.g., 'Business Hotel', 'Luxury Suites'), so no direct mapping. Activities are described generically as 'Family-friendly cultural experiences' without a specific activity from the rated list. Additional services mention 'EpiPen, medical documentation' and 'Detailed medical preparation' which do not correspond to any rated additional hotel service items. Therefore, the only item we can map exactly is the destination 'Prague, Czech Republic'.
